justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted the user's initial request for 'next Friday' as June 5th, and then accurately processed the follow-up request for 'Thursday, June 4th, around 9 AM'.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent effectively offered alternative dates (Thursday, June 4th, or Saturday, June 6th) when the user's initial preference for Friday, June 5th, was unavailable.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent efficiently gathered all necessary information and booked the appointment in just three turns without any redundant questions or API calls.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was smooth and professional, with the agent maintaining a helpful tone and successfully booking the appointment without any friction points.
